headline: LNT vs. AEE: Which Electric Utility Stock Offers Better Growth in 2026?
summary: Alliant Energy and Ameren invest billions in renewable energy projects and grid modernization initiatives to support growing data center-related electricity demand.

headline: How The Ameren (AEE) Story Is Shifting With Data Center Growth And Mixed Analyst Views
summary: Ameren’s blended fair value estimate has shifted slightly, edging from US$120.40 to about US$119.87 per share. This keeps it broadly in line with the wider range of analyst price targets between US$110 and US$126. That small adjustment reflects a mix of upbeat views on long term growth drivers like data center related load and transmission projects, set against more cautious sector wide revisions and valuation resets from firms that have recently trimmed their targets.
